Class ProofStarter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.ProofStarter
public class ProofStarter extends Object
This class encapsulates the registration of a proof for a given problem. It then starts a proof attempt.

After the proof attempt stops (successfully or not) the side proof is by default unregistered, but can be accessed via this class.

    Proof obligation for a given formula or sequent

  • Constructor Details

    • ProofStarter

      public ProofStarter(boolean useAutoSaver)
      creates an instance of the ProofStarter
      Parameters:
      useAutoSaver - boolean indicating whether the proof shall be auto saved

    • ProofStarter

      public ProofStarter(@Nullable ProverTaskListener ptl, boolean useAutoSaver)
      creates an instance of the ProofStarter
      Parameters:
      ptl - the ProverTaskListener to be informed about certain events
      useAutoSaver - boolean indicating whether the proof shall be auto saved

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(JTerm formulaToProve, ProofEnvironment env) throws ProofInputException
      creates a new proof object for formulaToProve and registers it in the given environment
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - if the proof obligation generation fails

    • init

      public void init(Sequent sequentToProve, ProofEnvironment env, String proofName) throws ProofInputException
      creates a new proof object for sequentToProve and registers it in the given environment
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - if the proof obligation generation fails

    • setTimeout

      public void setTimeout(long timeout)
      set timeout for the proof search; the value -1 disables the timeout
      Parameters:
      timeout - long specifying the time limit in milliseconds (ms)

    • getMaxRuleApplications

      public int getMaxRuleApplications()
      Returns the maximal steps to be performed.
      Returns:
      The maximal steps to be performed.

    • setMaxRuleApplications

      public void setMaxRuleApplications(int maxSteps)
      set maximal steps to be performed
      Parameters:
      maxSteps - the maximal proof steps (rule applications) to be applied during proof search

    • setStrategy

      public void setStrategy(Strategy<@NonNull Goal> strategy)

    • setStrategyProperties

      public void setStrategyProperties(StrategyProperties sp)
      Initializes the strategy with the provided settings. The proof object must be created at that point.
      Parameters:
      sp - the Strategy properties to be used for the proof search
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the proof object is not yet created

    • start

      public ProofSearchInformation<Proof,Goal> start()
      Starts proof attempt. The proof object must be created at that point.
      Returns:
      the proof after the attempt terminated
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the proof object is not yet created

    • start

      public ProofSearchInformation<Proof,Goal> start(ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
      Starts the proof attempt. The proof object must be created at that point.
      Returns:
      the proof after the attempt terminated
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the proof object is not yet created

    • init

      public void init(Proof proof)
      Initializes the proof starter with the provided proof object. All settings for the proof search are queried from the proof object
      Parameters:
      proof - the Proof on which to run the proof attempt

    • getProof

      public @Nullable Proof getProof()
      Returns the managed side Proof.
      Returns:
      The managed side Proof.
